🚨 Deloitte is Hiring!
💼 Role: Associate Analyst / Analyst – Engagement Support (USI)
📍 Location: Hyderabad (Hybrid)
🕑 Shift: 2 PM – 11 PM (Mon–Fri)
🎓 Eligibility: Graduates (B.Com, B.Sc, B.A, etc.) with 6 months–2 years of experience in backend operations
💻 Skills: MS Office, CRM/SAP/Salesforce knowledge a plus
🌐 Client: US-based support
💡 Work: Engagement setup, WBS creation, client communication

✨ Thrive in Deloitte’s positive culture
🚀 Upskill with world-class training at DU – The Leadership Center
🌱 Make an impact that matters!

📲 Apply now & be part of a global leader!


https://usijobs.deloitte.com/en_US/careersUSI/JobDetail/USI-EH-FY25-EA-MF-CA-CBS-Admin-Shared-Services-Analyst-Associate-Analyst/211309
